reviews.review_title: Are we ever getting new movies?
reviews.review_description: I’ve rented both featured movies, and while they were fantastic experiences; I feel that this app is lacking content, months later. High potential, low follow through.

Yes, it was fun to watch the movie while chilling in the same basement as in the movie but I might as well go to big screen and watch it in a crazy retro basement... maybe Megan is scarier but seriously not A SINGLE jump scare???? The black balloons at the end were the most terrifying part.. that's so sad, this had so so much potential...

I had a great time in this app. The enhancements to the movies is really cool. Personally i dont understand why people are complaining about renting a movie. My only complaint is that there's only 2 movies. I'm sure it takes time to add the effects but i wish the developers had better communication about what or IF any other movies were coming

reviews.review_title: The App: hit into an issue, PTA
reviews.review_description: I watched M3GAN last night but did not finish it because the headset's battery went low. Today I was planning to finish the movie, but the App Kept displaying the same screen: "hit into an issue, try again." Is there any way to get a refund for a movie I paid for? Thanks

Honestly the most fun I've had watching a movie in a very long time!  I would rather do this than the theater and I love theater popcorn.  If this is any indication of the future of cinema I'm all in.  Blew my mind!  People are right I would love to own the title would probably pay a ridiculous amount to own it to rewatch whenever I wanted. 20, 30, 40 or more. And please come out with more titles!  M3gan 2 would be cool.  Well done Blumhouse!

A VR enhanced cinematic experience. New creative way to immerse yourself in the film. My only complaint is they do not have more movies to watch!

Please add some more!

DO NOT ignore the 1 start reviews. I assume the person that said that is an employee. 
Rented M3gan, and did not start the movie until the next day. I started the movie, and ran out of charge halfway through. I went back this evening (the next day) to finish the movie, but it is no longer available. They claim the timer starts when you hit play, but they actually start the timer on purchase. No customer support means F0ck me and anyone else that tries to rent a movie. The immersive rental was cool so it's a real bummer.

developer_response.body:
Hi BumminWithBowie,

We're sorry to hear you had this issue, please contact us on bh@nexusstudios.com  so we can assist further.

reviews.review_title: Screen goes black will not play movie
reviews.review_description: After hours of trouble shooting the movie still will not play. Everything else works just fine

developer_response.body:
Hi GTUSUM,

Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had this issue. 

Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: I can only speak for myself here, but i rented both Megan and Black Phone and watching both was just a wonderful experience.  Having things happening around you that reflect what is happening on screen really immerses you in the film with the atmosophere it creates. There are also some fun little moments throughout the films which i won't spoil here (just stay for the end credits of Black Phone). The only problem i had was the film not resuming at place where i left it (luckily i remembered the point i jumped off at). I hope there will be more enhanced films like this in the future, not just from Blumhouse but from other film makers as well.

If you purchase a rental, start and stop playback, exit the app and come back. You might get prompted to re-rent the film if you navigate via the "library" menu item. This is so despite being within the 48hr rental period and playback limit. Successful playback can be obtained by starting the film from the movie previews carousel. It's clearly a bug. I also had the app crash during playback. Otherwise, it's a fun way to watch a film i enjoy (m3gan.)

add more please!!! It would be amazing
Money well spent!!!!!

If this is the future of cinema, I am completely on board. I think the critiques that these are only rentals are shortsighted because the platform needs to be supported to have other opportunities like this.

I waited to post this review until I could see both the “B￼lack Phone” and “Megan”. I completely understand why these are the movies chosen for this treatment but have to say “Megan” is the better experience. There are more special effects to work with, and it does not disappoint.

To me, this is far superior than seeing a movie in the theater, albeit solitarily. The spatial sound design on these movies, nothing I’ve experienced  on the Meta quest three has even compared.

Awesome great pop out at your eye effects. Needs more of a team to add more movies. Even more amazing to watch movies through this then my 65 inch oled 4k tv or even at a imax theater. If only they remade the 2 avatars for this app. Really cool stop complaining about having to pay lousy 6 dollar rental fee you're supporting the developers to hopefully add more movies

Only 4.99 for a great experience, everything works as described, I don't know why this app has such a bad rating,  people complaining for not being able to share but that's clearly stated and others for not being able to buy, but is a good price for renting, if it was a higher price I will get it. The only thing that I would complain about is that there is only two titles, but that may be for lack of demand and the bad ratings.

reviews.review_title: This is awesome and what I always wanted
reviews.review_description:
But there is a big issue. Rent only. As usual there should be two options. Rent and own. I want to be able to pay and watch this multiple times and share with friends and family and I can’t keep renting it every time I want to show someone etc. keep the rent option but add a purchase for the usual movie amounts and we’re on to something.

To go extra mile, let us invite friends to watch together in vr, vr is all about social.

Having said that. This is what vr can offer movies and what I love about it. I hope more studios do this with their movies in vr. Cause this is what immersive movie watching is like and something you cannot recreate outside of vr. Good job on this.

Hope more movies keep coming

I am a movie lover. I have seen the black phone movie before but watching it in this experience  was as though I was watching the movie for the first time.  I truly enjoyed this experience and did not mind the rental fee when I know there is a lot of work that goes into getting us to experience such  an experience .  I know that with time they will only improve. Hoping for more movies and experiences as such and look forward to  even better surroundings. Super cool! 😎

This app’s marketing was very misleading. You are only given the option to rent (2) movies for 48 hours. You aren’t able to experience this with a friend. It is a 100% solo, isolated experience. The app is also in a terrible state. I rented the Megan movie thinking I’d get to have a cool experience with a friend. Nope. I get to watch it alone, while the app crashes mid movie more than 8 times within the first 20 minutes of the movie. 

I have no interest in paying money to watch movies alone. If there is no social integration, why would I spend a dime? 

Majorly disappointed. I do not reccomend this app.

developer_response.body:
Hi L_teaa,
Thanks for taking the time to provide a review and sharing the feedback with us. We're really sorry to hear you're experiencing issues and we understand how frustrating it may be. 

Rest assured we are actively troubleshooting and it would be helpful to learn more about the issue you've encountered. Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can learn more, such as the Quest OS version you are on?

reviews.review_title: Keeps telling me to update my OS
reviews.review_description: It keeps telling me it doesn't run on the old OS. Only thing is my OS is updated to the newest so just letting you guys know that there's a bug. I'll update my rating when it's fixed👍

developer_response.body:
Hi Gi0562,

We're sorry to hear you had this issue, please contact us on bh@nexusstudios.com  so we can assist further.

If you are able, please send through the long OS version number that is displayed below the main OS version number in Settings.

reviews.review_title: Cheap, cash grab, low quality, just bad
reviews.review_description: I cannot believe this is a finished product. It's not even good as a concept. How do these people waste so much money developing garbage?!

Stop with the low stars because you don't like the rental idea. 
You are just cutting off your nose off to spite your face. 
Look, these guys are the first people to do this, and it's pretty awesome and it's just going to get better with the tech.    Sitting in a basement environment is pretty cool for the Black Phone, as well as all of the different environments for Megan. 
It's  awesome is what it is. 
I've been expecting this years ago back when the Oculus came out and these guys are finally the first ones to do it.  
The rental idea makes sense, in case there's ever an issue with this version of the software.   

Well done Blumhouse!  Way to be a step ahead of everyone!

developer_response.body:
Hi armyjackson,
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are delighted that you like it!

reviews.review_description:
I really dug this but wish there more movies!
 There's only still the 2!

reviews.review_title: Bro, I don’t even know how to play the m
reviews.review_description: I don’t even know how to play the movie?

This is incredible! Let me tell you, the experience is amazing. It’s actually so immersive and cool I can’t even explain. I thought it was gonna be a flat screen and the environment changes around you according to the current setting of the movie. And although this is true, I didn’t expect 3d things to COME OUT OF THE SCREEN!!! The experience is amazing! I love it. Now okay, I get it. Currently it has no buy option and there’s a few bugs (I have not encountered any so far myself, I’m just going by what others have wrote) BUT 2.7 STARS IS RIDICULOUS! All they need to do is add a buy option and straighten out a few launch day bugs. GUYS CMON! This is an amazing experience. Now I’m really worried that because of the low launch day ratings, the devs aren’t gonna continue to support this app with future titles. That would be so disappointing given that it genuinely is such an amazing experience and the 1 star ratings are just so heavy handed given their about things that can so easily be added. DEVS! Please don’t give up on this app, please add a buy feature and keep working on this cause it s so awesome. GREAT JOB! I love blumhouse too, if I were to request a movie it would be “The visit” because I can already think of the environments and immersion “creepy basement, crawl space, and other things that would make it awesome. And “Happy death day”. That would be GREAT!
Been out this long and still the same 2 movies
Definitely a more enhanced experience watching movies. IMAX on steroids.

Just watched M3GAN in Blumhouse's new VR Cinema app. I loved this movie but WOW with new VR effects its even better! This is how movies are ment to be watched! 😍

Yes its solo only, yes you can only rent movies at the moment. I'm sure they can add multi-player and buying the movies later as they add more movies.

I get that people want to own the movies, Which would be great however, for the two offerings currently available. I really enojoyed this new immersive way of watching movies. My suggestion would be: Having a friend mode. even if you both have to rent the movie. allow them to sync the movie in real time. So much potential here.

I just watched the Black Phone. Besides the fact the movie itself is great, there were a good handful of visual immersive effects I found to be very impressive. I won’t spoil anything, but the transition into certain scenes can be very cool. However, the app doesn’t go far enough with this concept. I will say that a good 2/3 of the movie is still barren, with no effects other than the occasional basement virtual environment, which by itself isn’t very impressive. I think it’s super cool Blumhouse is doing this, and I think with enough improvement it could be something really special. I’m its current state however, it’s very hit or miss.

It was very easy to set up my virtual room. I enjoyed the effects and felt it added a lot to an already good movie. 
  I see plenty of complaints about it being a rental program instead of purchasing the movie, but I pay much more for a movie theatre ticket to see a movie just once- and this was much more enjoyable. 
  I do wish in the future they would add a feature to invite another VR user into your virtual room to watch it with you, but it was still a great experience.

reviews.review_title: it’s AWSOME!! I love the 3D and Depth
reviews.review_description: The experience is AWSOME I love it I hope you add more Movies soon!! I would love it 🎥🍿

This is a lot of potential, and I was very excited when I saw a clip on meta connect. Well now the time has come. I read reviews before trying and I was let down, however I was very eager so I gave it a shot. First off if you have a pre saved room set up, you're going to have to clear it and rescan. The app for some reason can get pass that part so after cleared and I rescanned I restarted the headset and launched the app. It loaded and set up my environment right away now!
The M3gan demo was awesome, literally had me grinning. Can't wait for more movies to incorporate this while it is incredible that we are here doing this type of stuff. Don't let the bad reviews fool you, you have to do the steps in order for it to work, at least for me it did.  

I second the idea of being able to buy the movie as opposed to rental only,  and being able to watch with others would be great.

I rented Megan yesterday I couldn’t finish bc it died so I’m trying to finish it but instead it just shows the loading screen and not leaving it just shows the loading screen nothing else 
Other than that it’s a great app

The idea is great, but there only 3 movies that you can rent. The free 1-2 minute preview of one of the three movies is underwhelming. Basically it’s this, you’re watching a movie in the setting of the movie. Sometimes the lighting of the movie matches the environment. That’s it. 

I don’t see any reason for an app to exist where you can only watch 3 movies.

reviews.review_title: Very Bad Launch, Not Worth the Download
reviews.review_description: So, I didn’t even get to experience a movie because I couldn’t even get into the app. Was stuck on the environment loading screen after the app refused to use my existing spatial data. After also reading online that 3D movies aren’t supported and it’s basically more 2D content for VR… I lost interest to even troubleshoot because what?! Why would we want to keep watching more 2D movies in VR when a lot of modern movies are filmed and released in 3D. A waste of potential and progress in the VR space as VR could be a great entertainment device especially for 3D movies. Whoever approved this launch, fire em and start over. Glad I didn’t pre-purchase any movies!

I am a HUGE fan of M3GAN, it's been a comfort movie since day 1. I gotta say this app is a crazy fun new way to experience it!  Wanna know what it's like getting hit in the face by a truck or fire?  Want M3GAN-vision?  And wanna know what TikTok is like on...substances?  So much fun!

And the spacial audio is superb. The bass rumbles. Close your eyes and you can almost pinpoint where the sound effects are in the space front of you. Excellent separation of the music too sitting in its own layer. 

Also agreed with the other reviewers - don't listen to the whiners. The rental is only $5 ("Oh big whoop!", just like other rental streaming apps) but you get a fun ride as a bonus!  I hope in the near future we can buy the movies so we can  experience over and over again and hopefully they'll do more movies.  I can't wait to watch Black Phone next!

Simply amazing. I feel like I stepped into the future of movies. I watched The Black Phone over the weekend. It's a very good movie, but I would have forgotten about it already had I just watched it in normal 2D. The effects made the movie so much more engaging. Watching a movie on the TV is going to leave me wanting more. I am looking forward to watching M3GAN. 

I'm dumbfounded by so many low-scoring reviews whining about not having multi-viewer or purchase options. Sure, suggest it, but don't downvote this amazing new experience because it doesn't yet have everything you could imagine. It's as if people time travelled from 2035 and are complaining that 2025 isn't as good.

I almost never rewatch movies, so the inability to purchase yet is not a big deal for me. Maybe young people who don't have memories of driving to Blockbuster find renting a movie offensive?

The only thing I would like added to the app is the ability to toggle the VR/AR modes manually in the settings.

UPDATE :  5 STAR ⭐ ⭐⭐⭐⭐ because It was actually pretty cool and I think more can be done in the future with this (graphically)🔥 It's headed in the right direction.

Please Add  "making the screen much bigger " and turning down the background brightness in mixed reality....so when I'm fully immersed I don't turn my head and Kinda still see some off my room.

DEFINITELY  Add 3d movies and combine that with this app and boom "A goldmine" 🪙 🪙 🪙 🪙

Update: I had reached out to support and a fix was released that resolved the issue I was having with the room setup. This on on PTC v81

TLDR - I like it. Atmospherically fun and immersive. Room Scale isn't working for me but the Virtual Room worked flawlessly.

My initial impressions are positive, but it is not a perfect experience. For starters, I was unable to get Room Scale tracking to work. The app wants you to set it up initially, but it was not accepting my already captured room even if I tried updating it. I tried a few different times unsuccessfully. The app does provide a Virtual Room as well and that worked without issue.

I know some will be disappointed that this does require you to rent the movies, and I agree kind of. It would've been great to have at least one of the movies as a free movie to get people in, but realistically I figured you'd be renting them when they announced it which isn't an issue, however I'd prefer you were able to buy the movie. Unless there is no timer on the rental, then that's fine too

The experience itself is good. It was done really well in my opinion. Effects timing is good, some milliseconds off, but I'm not here to nitpick. It's a great effort and I look forward to more movies being added.
You can only rent the movie. Hard pass. You can't even share the space with friends to watch with. Like it seems ok but ive never rented a movie and never will.

Mark wont get it done so others charge money for a limited version of what should already be a thing. Not buying jack right now just to gamble 90% of it being a wall skin. Lets be honest megan is not gonna peak from behind the screen and jump towards you the whole movie. Walls are not gonna explode because a bomb went off ect. Trailer just wants to pretend like every other app on this headset like its gonna do more than what its actually gonna do. Try again.

so far only two movies is available and it's only available to rent. the features of the environment for the movies are awesome. also no feature for watching with friends or family. i'm very hopeful for upgrades and improvements on this product.

OMG!!! If you love horror, and crave more out of it, you GOTTA try this!!! It only offers M3gan and Black Phone, and yes it's only 48 hour rental, but it's SO WORTH IT! I strongly recommend it. I hope the devs do more with this and eventually add more to it. Blumhouse, if you are reading this, please, please, please keep developing more of this! I can not stress enough of how good this is and how it needs to be further updated with more films like this. Please people, let's band together to make this happen! 😁

I don't leave reviews for anything.  But this was absolutely incredible.  I've never experienced anything like this before.  Mind-blowing.  Very few times in life I experience something I know in the moment that I will remember forever; this is one of those moments.  This is the future of cinema and I hope Blumhouse keeps the movies coming and other studios take notice.

I'm hoping more films are released soon. Lots of fun. I do wish the movies themselves were 3D, but not enough to knock off a star.

Also, I understand some people are disappointed that the movies are rental only, but it's better than having your purchases disappear when an app stops being supported -- like happened to me with Oculus Video and VUDU/Fandango. Now I'll ONLY rent.

My only complaint is only two movies available. This is what I’ve always wanted is the only reason I even considered the Apple headset was for movie mode but not worth the price of admission here you only charge for the rental of a movie. Kudos to you guys ￼￼

Ok no serious more please when are more titles coming?

reviews.review_title: great but can't complete the movie
reviews.review_description:
the actual movie experience is great environment only thing is missing is the movie to actually be in threed but other than that it's amazing.i haven't been able to completely watch a movie every time i pause it i come out of the app it counted as a complete word so my rental is finished and i haven't made it to complete even one movie . because every pause are just taking a break for the movie the movies are the movies are long so every part is counted towards the end though so i 
haven't finished the movie

So far I have tried the demos and thought this was a really cool idea. Rented Megan last night and only got about half way due to late night and getting tired. Gonna finish it up today and then try Black Phone. But I will say, just the first half of Megan I was blown away by the enhancements. Very cool stuff and can’t wait for more movies. I know it wasn’t the greatest movie but I am surprised they didn’t start with Paranormal Activity Dimensions. That movie is already 3d so to have a 3d  movie with the extra stuff now would be amazing! Final thought is, yes you desperately need to add a purchase option. $5 to rent or $10 to own etc… you would make a lot more money

This is a pretty neat idea and excited to see where it goes but I feel like they could’ve started with better movies other than the black phone and Megan. Black phone is a good movie don’t get me wrong but I think they’re were better movies they could’ve picked for a more intense immersive experience

reviews.review_title: Great, but needs a download option.
reviews.review_description:
Overall, you get a pretty novel experience that you can't get anywhere else. Very much worth it. However, if you don't have the greatest connection speeds then there isn't an option to download movies for uninterrupted viewing. 

My internet was just barely enough - most of the time it ran fine, but occasionally it started buffering. And that can kill your immersion if everything stops in the middle of an action scene. Just let us download movies and this app would be perfect.

reviews.review_title: Best way to watch a movie
reviews.review_description:
I've never seen anything like this movie app !!! 
It goes wayyy  beyond just putting reflections in the room to match the movie 
This can incorporate  anything in your environment  and adjust it to look like part of the movie. 
Police cars were coming out of my bedroom and driving down the hallway.
 This technology is so cool but I don't want to renting. But M3GaN blew my mind!!!

reviews.review_title: It works! And it works great
reviews.review_description: I finally got to experience this amazing app! For all those who are having the issue where the app gets stuck in preparing your environment, there’s an easy fix! It turns out that the reason wasn’t working is due to WiFi connectivity issues, so the best way to fix it is to get as close as possible to your internet router, this app is simply amazing all the atmosphere and effects added to the movies are a total new experience hope more movies come up soon, this is the future of movies!

Most impressed by the devs for this app.  It was stuck at "Launching" on my Quest 3 and they went the extra mile to work with me over email and got it resolved.  Unfortunately, the steps to resolve my issue involved a bit of magic on their end but certainly appreciate their communication!

Watched the black phone and it was pretty cool. Enjoyed all the different environments, ghosts, and flash back style. Wish there was a bit more interactive or spooky parts similar to the credits. Overall it was well worth the rental but hope to see a buy option in future. Excited to see which other movies make the VR cut.

It looks remarkable! But rental?Seriously?
First mistake- we can't watch with friends.
Second mistake Rental.
You didn't research your target audience.
$4.99 rental
$7.99 purchase 
You might have had a cash cow, but all you did was alienate the market!

I’ve read the other reviews. I get it. Renting versus owning isn’t optimal. However, this was the coolest VR cinema experience I’ve had! From the opening menu through the film itself is a sense of dread. I was on edge thinking something would pop out of the shadows in the corner of my room lol. I watched Megan, and there were so many cool moments (that I don’t want to ruin). The opening immersion with the Furby like toys was hilarious lol! If every movie had this, I swear you wouldn’t be able to get me out of my headset. Great work! Please add more 💯🙌🏾

I had an issue with getting it started, but once I talked to the customer support team and got it fixed I was able to do the M3GAN enhanced experience. It was super cool, although I do wish there was an option to buy the movies and not just rent.

The product you have created is not perfect, but comes with limitless possibilities. Heed the advice of the people: Make buying an option, make more selections available quicker. I promise you, just these two changes alone will take your product to the stratosphere. The experience you’re offering can be a game changer. But many ideas have ended up in the “graveyard of what could have been” because developers were slow to react, forcing people to move on to the next big thing. Don’t let this be you because you’re really at the cusp of something special. And there are lots and lots of folks rooting you on.

This exactly what ive been wanting with watching movies in vr. My only problems is id like to own the movies instead of just renting and to be able to fully download the movie to my headset so I don't have to worry about my bad internet connection. Anyways this is a step in a good direction and I cant wait for them to add more movies like the halloween trilogy and the fnaf movies

I'm sure we all have been wanting to watch a movie where the surrounding virtual environment comes to life and this is that but unfortunately limited to their own movies. As I'm sure everybody's aware they have to include detail by detail and you won't be able to upload your own movies , I'm sure one day someone will come up with an app that allows any movie you upload to be mimicked by it postprocessing close enough by the movies data and scenes etc AI would definitely help with this! But for now, this isn't that app that will give you that experience, but it will give you the experience limited by their own content that's remapped and post-processed and paid.Untill then the search continues but this is a step in the right direction I look forward to one day seeing another virtual movie theater that brings these virtual environments to life besides just paid media and can be used by our own media!.

If you prefer this scenario, then this app is for you:  
You download and install the app....then you pay $5 to use it...and it looks cool...so you can't wait til you show it off to someone else a few days later...so you have to pay another $5 to do so.  Rinse and Repeat.  

If that sounds great to you, then this app is great.  
If this sounds like a money-suck...then you're normal, and this app won't be for you. 

UPDATE:  I gave it another shot...and the sample of the movie failed to load after the successful calibration process.   So my 1 STAR rating will permanently remain.  Kudos to the Blumhouse company for attempting what they did...and I hope they try to make this thing work out better.  
But after giving this two attempts, and still left feeling extremely disappointed, I gotta tap-out.   1 STAR....DO BETTER.

developer_response.body:
Hi Wet_Blister, 

Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had the issue with the previews not working. 

Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: This is the ultimate way to experience a movie. It was super, SUPER cool. Every movie should be enhanced and viewed this way. I want more of these now! If that new Avatar movie isn’t using this then they are selling themselves short. So amazing. So cool.

I enjoyed both of the movies and loved the things that they added in VR for them. Granted, there were one or two things I was kind of hoping to see that weren’t present, but they may have been limited by resources, licensing, or both. Speaking of licensing, anyone complaining about the fact that you can’t buy movies through the app has to realize that digital “ownership”, such as it exists, is limited by the developer’s ability to maintain the license to stream these movies. Companies like Amazon are willing to do that, but it’s a risk even for them, and NBC probably isn’t willing to take that risk for a VR app, VR still being a niche platform. If cash flow to this app dries up, the developer would be SOL if they were on the hook for maintaining those licenses.

All of that said, I hope to see more movies with even more immersive effects in the future. Thanks!

reviews.review_title: The start of something potentially great
reviews.review_description:
I rented M3GAN and the affects were very fun. My only gripes right now is that the movies are only rentals. If there was a social extension where you can invite others to view it with you, that would be a big bonus. As would being able to purchase the movies. 

For what it is now, 4 stars because I did have a good experience. It falls short, but only just.

This app is a good￼ app to Watch movies, because it puts you in the movie like if you’re there, and in the explosion place on the Megan add on the things go into your screen like the sparks and when there’s a boy in the forest and he gets run over by the car, the car comes into your screen that’s pretty cool.

I watched Black Phone . Definitely increased the creep factor with the visuals. I hope they do include an option to own one day and im looking forward to watching more films in it. I think this was a great idea!

Constantine would be awesome 
For this program.
I love this concept.
Especially because I have something called aphantisha which means that I can’t visualize. 
But I gave it a 3 stars because theres no buy options.

I paid $5 for The Black Phone movie and the app would crash every single time while loading the movie up. Had no problem watching the preview. So, I figured it was because I am part of the meta beta program and it’s not working with the latest update. I thought I would just wait until later to watch it and I’ve been trying almost everyday to get it working. Never worked. Today I open to app to find out that I have to pay for it again. While it’s just $5, don’t waste your money! Listen to the other reviews!

developer_response.body:
Hi BaoAbove, 

Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear you've had this issue. 

Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: I really want to like this app. I downloaded the app and watched Megan on it and it was really cool. I like the added effects. However i have gone back in to watch Black Phone and the app will not work. I start it and its just says loading. I waited for over ten minutes for it to work….nothing. I deleted and reloaded the app as well as restarting the headset. Still nothing. I dont know if the update V81 for the quest has something to do with this but this is literally the only app i am having a problem with. I want to rate this higher but since it does not work i can not. I would still only give it 3 to 4 stars as there is only 2 movies you can rent. After that it is useless until maybe they feel like putting more movies on it.

developer_response.body:
Hi flexbuffchest,

Thanks for taking the time to leave a review. We're sorry to hear you've had this issue. 

Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_title: Kids are review bombing - ignore them!
reviews.review_description:
Ignore the negative reviews, you have a bunch of juveniles review bombing this app because they have to pay to watch movies. Listen - there is nothing like this out there right now and it’s early, it’s going to take time to get movies enhanced and added to the library. If you want more movies licensed and the option to buy them, YOU HAVE TO SUPPORT THE DEVS. The kids review bombing because they have to spend their allowance or get part time jobs need to grow up. 

To the mature adults outside there who understand business fundamentals, try it, it’s pretty cool and unique experiences. Again, SUPPORT THE DEVS!!!!

reviews.review_title: The Future of Immersive VR Cinema
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been waiting for an experience like this on the Quest since the launch! Everyone should try this app. Blumhouse is moving the medium forward in new ways and it’s so cool to see. The way the app used my room mapping to overlay the environment was so cool…my windows were represented and there was a scary forest outside them! Awesome stuff. 

Also, I don’t mind the rentals. These complainers don’t seem to understand a business model. Did you expect the movies to be free?

Admittedly, it would be great if they added a purchase option so you could go back and watch again at a later date or demo to friends and family though. And I do agree with other reviewers on the addition of co-watching and being able to experience this with others. Both me and my husband have headsets and it would be cool to be in the same room together. I’m hoping that functionality won’t be too difficult for them to add as they go forward. Black Phone 2 is coming up! 

I can’t wait to see where the developers take this app as it continues to evolve. Great start! Get in there and give it a try with the free previews.

UPDATE: I tried to watch Megan last night for Halloween and it crashed everytime it got ready to start. The “preparing your environment” process would get to 100% and then boot me out to passthrough and close the app. I’m on V83 via the Public Test Channel so not sure if this is the issue. But it’s a problem since I only have 48 hours to watch the rental. Have emailed the Devs and not heard back. Removing a star until issues like this are resolved.

A studio finally makes a tv specific streaming app and this is what we get? Aside from it being extremely glitchy, which I assume they fix with updates, it’s the same quality of VR app we’ve had for years. The effects aren’t clever or original and they’re more disruptive than immersive.

This is a really cool idea and I am all for it and I hope that more companies start to do the same thing was having a few issues with scanning the room but was able to figure it out i would love to watch more movies like this, but please add an option to buy movies as well as being able to view the movie with other people. As well as make the movies 3D.

Was excited after reading some reviews, but was disappointed after watching the black phone.  No 3D (except for the 1 second green bottle exploding), only moving lights around the screen and fake animation around you. No jump scares that come at you. I want my $5 back.

I like this title. It is unique in its own way.  The movie I care about is MEGAN.  I hope MEGAN 2 will be added.

A couple of suggestions to consider for a 10 star rating😀

1)  Option to purchase the movie or long term rental. 


2)  Add 3D to the movie, or at least make it an option to turn on or off. 


Great job developers
The only issue is the rental. Otherwise this alone would make me buy another headset. It needs a lot more movies and shows but the concept and execution is awesome. Can't wait to see what is next.

reviews.review_title: Crashes before I can watch it
reviews.review_description: On the Quest 3. When I click on Watch Now, it goes into "Loading Environment" then it crashes every time. The preview loaded just fine. It's not even eligible for a refund even though I can't watch it

developer_response.body:
Hi renegade01

Thanks for taking the time to contact us. We're sorry to hear you've had this issue. 

Please email us at bh@nexusstudios.com so we can try and assist further. If you can, please let us know both the OS version and OS build number of your device.

reviews.review_description: After my headset updated the app finally worked.. it’s a cool app but need better movies!! Black phone is good but Megan is just trash!! And you have to pay each time you watch the movie.. not sure what you’re trying to accomplish with that but that’s not how you get people to use your app.. my original rating was a 1 but now I’ll give it a 3.. update the movies and fix the renting system and you’ll have a 5 star app!!
Enjoyed this so much, honestly I believe its the future of movies. Make it multiplayer and it's unstoppable, loads of potential to revitalize old movies and make fantastic new ones. I'm sold I'm in .

This seemed like a great idea but unfortunately it's anti-immersion technology for horror movies. This might be just what you're looking for if horror movies are too scary for you, but I love scary movies.

I thought it was going to use augmented reality to do creepy things in my own room while I watched a movie, like have shadows moving in the corner or something menacing appear outside my window, instead it quickly transitions to full VR once the movie starts.

The movies don't bleed into your space. The app takes you out of your space and into theirs.

This is akin to Big Screen Beta only restricted to one viewer at a time in a theater that's designed to interact with specific movies.

The moment objects from the film start to appear in the VR environment the immersion in the film is lost and it just feels like you're in a tech demo. This will suck all the fear out of even the most terrifying horror film.

I saw some negative reviews about the structure of pay and lack of a multi-user experience. 

While I do feel having a multi user experience would be a smart addition, I personally don't have an issue with the pay system. I feel like it makes sense. The way I look at it, to see a movie in theaters you're going to be paying three times as much. Here, the effects extend to your environment giving you a whole new way to experience movies. Personally, I think it's pretty brilliant and well done.

However, there are a couple things I wish it had. 

First, it's not in 3D. Huge opportunity. I dont need to elaborate how 3D would make it better, that's obvious.

2nd, and MOST IMPORTANT, they NEED to have a feature similar to the spacial app or where you can quickly disable hand tracking. It really takes away from the experience seeing your ghost hands along with the cursor floating around. This severely impacts the experience. I ended up disabling it in the settings but then the controllers starting floating in my view again, ruining the overall experience. If the devs read this, please implement a fix. 

Outside of that, really cool way to watch movies and I'm excited to see where it goes.
